description.ko: 유리를 통과하는 빛의 여정을 시각적으로 탐구하며, 백색광이 프리즘을 통해 고유의 색상들로 분리되는 정교한 순간을 포착하여 투명함과 생생한 스펙트럼 색조의 조화를 보여줍니다.
description.en: A visual study of light's journey through glass, capturing the precise moment white light splits into its constituent colors through a prism, creating a harmonious blend of clarity and vibrant spectral hues.

prompt: A macro cinematic shot of a high-clarity triangular crystal prism placed on a minimalist matte surface. A sharp, focused beam of white light enters the prism and disperses into a vivid, brilliant rainbow spectrum. The scene features soft chromatic aberration, elegant caustic light patterns reflecting on the background, 8k resolution, hyper-realistic glass textures, and clean laboratory-style lighting.
